name: Termination
text: Either Party may terminate this Agreement by giving written notice to the other Party if the other Party commits a material breach and fails to remedy such breach within a reasonable period.

legal_basis.note: Refusal to perform — right to rescind
Failure to perform at fixed time
Contracts not specifically enforceable — damages remedy

invalid_if: Termination rights granted to only one party without justification
title: Termination
dispute_hotspots: What constitutes 'Material Breach' — most litigated question in Indian contract terminations
Adequacy of notice — oral notice is insufficient
Termination for convenience in long-term contracts — courts examine good faith
Effect of termination on pending payments — ensure clause addresses this
